data.content: Suppressed terminal completion pulse during initial session rehydrate so persisted stale sessions (e.g. 27bb/1fbb) no longer flash on startup; pulse still fires on real completed transitions. Added completion tracker option + regression test. Validated with bun run lint, bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, NODE_ENV=production bun run build. Pushed main at a1f686d.
